raw.label: Raw model output
raw.blurb: Even with an isolation prompt the model leaves drum hits in the mix.

clean.label: After Demucs
clean.blurb: Same audio, separated. Clean bass alone.

naive.label: Naive prompt → Demucs bass
naive.prompt: bass line, 130 BPM, E minor, electric bass
naive.blurb: Drums 8.7 dB louder than the bass itself — Lyria treated 'bass line' as a band track and Demucs couldn't undo it.

engineered.label: Engineered prompt → Demucs bass
engineered.prompt: solo electric bass guitar recording, dry
engineered.blurb: Bass 34.5 dB louder than the drum residual — drums effectively silent.

naive_bass.label: Naive bass prompt
naive_bass.prompt: bass line, 130 BPM, E minor, electric bass
naive_bass.blurb: Lyria gave back bass *and* drums because the prompt didn't say not to.
